Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions Of Plaintiffs Retained Experts Zachary Moore Pe And Paul Slosar Md
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lauren J. Koblitz, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, T:415.438.5937, for defendants/moving party;
Nicholas A. Boylan, Esq. of the Law Offices of Nicholas A. Boylan APC, for plaintiff/opposing party.

DEFENDANTS LYFT, INC. and UMUT KULAHLI'S Motion To Compel Depositions Of Plaintiff's Retained Experts Zachary Moore, P.E. And Paul Slosar, M.D., and for monetary sanctions.

RULING: The matter was argued. The Court ordered the parties to meet and confer off the record. The matter was recalled. The parties have reached a stipulation, which was read into the record. After the hearing, the Court ruled as follows: The tentative ruling is vacated. Defendant's motion is ordered off calendar in light of the stipulation and the request for sanctions is denied. Trial date is continued to February 26, 2018 pursuant to the parties' stipulation. Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare the order re: the motion to compel and Defendant's counsel shall prepare the order re: trial continuance. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
